---
title: "MB5370_Module02"
author: "Katie Dyck"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Create a new GitHub repository for this module & connect to RStudio

```{r Connect to GitHub}
# in the console:
#   credentials::git_credential_ask()
#   usethis::git_sitrep()
#   usethis::use_git()

# after staging and committing files from the Git pane, in the console:
  # usethis::use_github()
```
